title: cyclosorus muricatus
intro: Cyclosorus muricatus, also known as the spiny wood fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is a type of vascular plant that is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and the Pacific Islands. The spiny wood fern has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Cyclosorus muricatus can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are said to offer health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues.
